remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

reviewed_controls.description: Identifies the controls being assessed and their control objectives.

uuid.description: A machine-oriented, globally unique identifier with a cross-instance scope.

Step.title: Step

SubjectReference.description: A human-oriented identifier reference to a resource. Use type to indicate whether the identified resource is a component, inventory item, location, user, or something else.

remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

subject_uuid.description: A UUID reference to the identified subject.

type.description: Indicates the nature or kind of the containing object.

SubjectReference.title: SubjectReference

SystemComponent.description: A defined component that can be part of an implemented system.

protocols.description: Information about the protocol used to provide a service.

purpose.description: A summary of the technological or business purpose of the component.

remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

status.description: Indicates the status of the containing object.

type.description: Indicates the nature or kind of the containing object.

uuid.description: A machine-oriented, globally unique identifier with a cross-instance scope.

SystemComponent.title: SystemComponent

SystemId.description: A human-oriented, globally unique identifier for a system.

id.description: A unique human-oriented identifier within a particular context.

identifier_type.description: A human-readable label for a specific identifier scheme.

SystemId.title: SystemId

SystemUser.description: A type of user that interacts with the system based on an associated role.

remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

role_ids.description: Role identifiers associated with the user.

short_name.description: A short common name, abbreviation, or acronym.

uuid.description: A machine-oriented, globally unique identifier with a cross-instance scope.

SystemUser.title: SystemUser

Task.description: Represents a scheduled event or milestone, which may be associated with a series of assessment actions.

dependencies.description: Tasks that this task depends on.

remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

subjects.description: Assessment subjects or subject references for this object.

timing.description: The timing under which a task is intended to occur.

type.description: Indicates the nature or kind of the containing object.

uuid.description: A machine-oriented, globally unique identifier with a cross-instance scope.

Task.title: Task

TaskDependency.description: Used to indicate that a task is dependent on another task.

remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

task_uuid.description: A UUID reference to a task.

TaskDependency.title: TaskDependency

TelephoneNumber.description: A telephone service number as defined by ITU-T E.164.

type.description: Indicates the type of phone number. Typical values: home, office, mobile. Other values are permitted.

TelephoneNumber.title: TelephoneNumber

TermsAndConditions.description: Used to define various terms and conditions under which an assessment can be performed.
TermsAndConditions.title: TermsAndConditions

ThreatId.description: A pointer, by ID, to an externally-defined threat.

href.description: A resolvable URL reference to a resource.

id.description: A unique human-oriented identifier within a particular context.

system.description: Specifies the system or scheme from which the identifier originates.

UsesComponent.description: The set of components that are used by the assessment platform.

component_uuid.description: A UUID reference to a component.

remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

remarks.description: Additional commentary about the containing object.

description: A root wrapper for an OSCAL document, which may be of any OSCAL document type (e.g. Catalog, Profile, Assessment Plan, SSP).
